text: LC and LT Key Concepts @ mstisncne. @ s ¢ Allow you to define the configuration of an EC2 instance in advance ¢ AMI, Instance Type, Storage & Key pair ¢ Networking and Security Groups ¢ Userdata & IAM Role ¢ Both are NOT editable - defined once. LT has versions. ¢ LT provide newer features - including T2/T3 Unlimited, Placement Groups, Capacity Reservations, Elastic Graphics
